title: AST SAR / Body Recovery: Cordova [AK20035686]
summary: On 5/28/2020 at approximately 0357 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers in Cordova received a report of a missing male in Eyak Lake in Cordova. Investigation revealed Zakary Zeigler, age 21 of Cordova was camping at Eyak Lake with several other people. Zeigler was on a kayak paddling back to shore when he fell out of the Kayak and could not get back in. A female jumped in to attempt to save Zeigler to no avail. An Alaska Wildlife Trooper from Cordova and a U.S. Forest Service Agent responded to the lake via jet boat and recovered Zeigler’s body from the lake. USCG, Cordova PD, Cordova Fire and EMS and US Forest Service were also on scene. Zeigler was not wearing a life jacket and alcohol is believed to be a factor. The SME was notified and requested the body be transported to Anchorage. Next of
